attractions.name: Vivekananda Rock Memorial
attractions.description: Built in honor of Swami Vivekananda, it marks the spot where he meditated and attained enlightenment
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Mr. Hanief-Kerela_copy.pdf
Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Faiz Kerela.pdf

attractions.name: Thiruvalluvar Statue
attractions.description: A towering tribute to the Tamil poet-philosopher Thiruvalluvar, whose 133-chapter classic Tirukkural is symbolically represented by the statue's 133-foot height
attractions.entry_fee: ₹20 per person (ferry charge to reach the statue island)
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Mr. Hanief-Kerela_copy.pdf
Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Faiz Kerela.pdf

attractions.name: Kanyakumari Beach
attractions.description: The southernmost beach of India where the Arabian Sea, Bay of Bengal, and Indian Ocean converge, offering spectacular sunrise and sunset views
